fields.title: Solar Panel Supply & Installation
fields.description: Supply of high-efficiency monocrystalline panels for the A64 corridor. Must include 25-year performance warranty.

fields.title: Electrical Grid Connection Works
fields.description: Trenching and cabling to connect the solar array to the local substation. Includes substation switchgear upgrades.

fields.title: Battery Storage Feasibility Study
fields.description: Consultancy package to determine optimal battery sizing for the solar corridor.

fields.title: Waterproofing Layer Application
fields.description: Application of root-resistant waterproofing membrane to Grade II listed roof structure.

fields.title: Sedum & Wildflower Matting
fields.description: Supply and installation of pre-grown sedum blankets with a diverse native wildflower mix.

fields.title: Mycelium Panel Fabrication
fields.description: Off-site manufacturing of bio-composite insulation panels grown from local agricultural waste.

fields.title: Riparian Tree Planting
fields.description: Planting of 2,000 willow and alder saplings along the riverbank for stabilization.

fields.title: Solar Panel Supply & Installation
fields.description: Installation of solar panels on tram stops. (Note: Same title as Project 1, but for Manchester Tram project).

fields.title: Recycled Steel Rails
fields.description: Procurement of high-grade recycled steel rails for the 3km extension.

fields.title: Tramway Civil Engineering Works
fields.description: Main infrastructure works including track laying and overhead line electrification.

fields.title: Hydroponic Racking Systems
fields.description: Vertical racking units with integrated irrigation for leafy green production.

fields.title: Horticultural LED Lighting
fields.description: Full spectrum LED grow lights with automated day/night cycle control.

fields.title: Triple Glazed Windows (Passivhaus)
fields.description: Supply and fit of certified Passivhaus windows with U-values below 0.8W/m2K.

fields.title: Air Source Heat Pumps
fields.description: Installation of 120 individual ASHP units for domestic hot water and heating.

fields.title: Insulated Pipework Laying
fields.description: Trenching and laying of twin pre-insulated pipes for the district heat network.

fields.title: Phytoremediation Services
fields.description: Planting of hyper-accumulator species to strip heavy metals from the soil.

fields.title: Smart Street Lighting Units
fields.description: Supply of 500 IoT-enabled LED street lamps.

fields.title: DC Rapid Chargers (150kW)
fields.description: High-voltage chargers for electric bus fleet. Must support pantograph charging.

fields.title: Soil Analysis
fields.description: Initial soil health testing kit for community volunteers.

fields.title: Sapling Supply (Native Mix)
fields.description: Supply of 3,000 whips (oak, birch, rowan) for dense micro-forest planting.
